faq.headText: 3SThreeI FAQ: Web, Mobile, Gaming & Design Services Ghana Mali

questions.question: How much does website development cost in Ghana or Mali?
questions.answer: Custom websites start at GHS 5,000–20,000 depending on features (e-commerce, booking systems). We offer flexible packages—contact for a tailored quote.

questions.question: What is the timeline for mobile app development?
questions.answer: Basic apps take 4-8 weeks; complex ones (payment integration, offline mode) 3-6 months. Optimized for Ghana/Mali networks.

questions.question: Do you develop games for Android/iOS in West Africa?
questions.answer: Yes, casual games to multiplayer titles. Optimized for low-data Mali/Ghana networks with Unity/Unreal Engine.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept in Ghana/Mali?
questions.answer: Mobile Money (MTN, Vodafone, Orange), bank transfers, PayPal, and local cards. Multi-currency quotes available.

questions.question: Do you offer maintenance after project completion?
questions.answer: Yes, monthly plans from GHS 500 for updates, security, hosting. 24/7 support for critical issues.

questions.question: Are your websites mobile-friendly for Ghana users?
questions.answer: 100% responsive design tested on popular Ghana devices (Tecno, Infinix, Samsung A-series).

questions.question: What technologies do you use for web development?
questions.answer: WordPress, React/Next.js, Laravel, Node.js. SEO-optimized and crawlable for Google Ghana rankings.

questions.question: Can you redesign existing websites?
questions.answer: Yes, full redesigns keeping content while improving speed, mobile UX, and SEO performance.

questions.question: Do you provide hosting services in Ghana?
questions.answer: Local Ghana servers + Cloudflare CDN for 3x faster loading. SSL certificates included.

questions.question: How do I get started with 3SThreeI?
questions.answer: Free 30-min consultation → project brief → custom quote within 24h → development starts.
